emptyCartHint: Tap a menu item to start
landingSubtitle: The modern, minimal POS system for fast-paced kitchens, live table maps, and direct online orders. Zero complexity.
featuresTitle: Everything you need to run your food business
featuresSubtitle: Real, battle-tested tools built directly into the system. No external plugins required.
featurePosDesc: High-speed checkouts, custom modifications, split payments, and direct receipt printing.
featureTablesDesc: Visual floor plans, real-time occupancy status, and table booking management.
featureKdsDesc: Paperless order routing, preparation timers, and ready-to-serve notifications.
featureOnlineDesc: Direct integrations with food aggregators like Zomato, Swiggy, and Deliveroo.
featureInventoryDesc: Track ingredients, stock alerts, purchase orders, and recipe cost control.
featureStaffDesc: Clock-in shifts, PIN logins, role permissions, and monthly payroll exports.
howItWorksTitle: Get up and running in three steps
step1Desc: Add your menu items, structure your tables, and invite your staff members with custom PINs.
step2Desc: Take dine-in or takeaway orders on the POS terminal, or accept online delivery partner webhooks automatically.
step3Desc: Review sales charts, check payroll status, or optimize food prep speed on a single unified dashboard.
ctaSubtitle: No credit card required. Setting up takes less than 10 minutes.
